tester.role: automated fontTools inspection with human result review

input: IBMPlexSerif-Regular.ttf from Google Fonts commit b598f5e3ad6849188c9c71714b0fafe11dc88e02.
steps: Download the exact TTF from the pinned Google Fonts source commit.
Inspect name, version, OS/2 fsType, cmap, GSUB/GPOS feature tags, and required currency code points.
Compare advance widths of base digits zero through nine.
Compare the reported version with IBM's canonical v6.4.2 package.
expected: File parses cleanly and any divergence from the canonical IBM package is named before production selection.
actual: Parsed as IBM Plex Serif Regular version 2.6. fsType was 0. Selected Latin and Cyrillic code points were present; the selected Greek check did not pass. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, and JPY were present. Base digits had equal widths and a slashed-zero feature was present. IBM's canonical v6.4.2 Regular reports version 3.001, so this mirror file is not accepted as the production desktop file.

artifacts.description: Candidate metadata and source caveat derived from this inspection

notes: Caveat is intentional: binary inspection succeeded, but source reconciliation failed. Historical hash remains valid evidence for the mirror file.
followUp: Audit the complete canonical v6.4.2 style set, choose preview files, compare metrics/outlines, and rerun pairing/application tests.
